text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 27 

LIS_MFTR_DSCNT_PCT 

LABEL: Applicable Discount Percentage for Specified Manufacturer Drugs Dispensed to LIS Beneficiaries 

DESCRIPTION: This field contains the phased-in manufacturer discount percentage that applies for the benefit year of 
the PDE for specified manufacturer drugs dispensed to Low Income Subsidy (LIS) eligible beneficiaries. 

SHORT
